title: Add CORS middleware to coordination API
description: Smoke test test_preflight_headers skips because the coordination API (src/coordination_api.py) has no CORSMiddleware configured. Browser-based clients (e.g., a future dashboard) would need CORS headers. Add FastAPI CORSMiddleware with configurable allowed origins (default: http://localhost:5173 for Vite dev server). Reference: openspec/specs/live-service-testing LST.6.

title: Add /ready endpoint to coordination API
description: Smoke test test_ready_endpoint skips because GET /ready doesn't exist on the coordination API. The /health endpoint works but /ready (which should indicate all dependencies are connected and migrations applied) is missing. Add a /ready endpoint that checks DB connectivity and returns {"status": "ok"} when all services are available. Reference: openspec/specs/live-service-testing LST.6.
